holdings.infoBox: UFO is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Viasat stock at 6.09%, Rocket Lab at 6.05%, Iridium Communications at 5.27%, Globalstar at 5.05%, and Planet Labs PBC at 5.04%.

overview.description: The Procure Space ETF (UFO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the VettaFi Space index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of aerospace companies located globally. UFO was launched on Apr 11, 2019 and is issued by ProcureAM.
